steps.title: Subtract the second equation from the first
steps.content:
Both equations have $3x$ on the left. Subtract equation 2 from equation 1 to eliminate $x$:

$$(3x + 6) - (3x + 4) = 4y - 2y$$

$$2 = 2y$$

steps.title: Solve for y
steps.content:
Divide both sides by 2:

$$y = 1$$

The value of $y$ is 1.
